summary: Enhanced mergeReviewFindings in bin/lib/flows.mjs to prepend a synthesis header containing total severity counts and a per-role count table before the severity-ranked findings. Used text labels (not emojis) in the header so parseFindings does not misinterpret synthesis lines as findings, preserving existing verdict behavior. Added a flows.test.mjs case asserting the synthesis header, totals, per-role rows, and ordering before the findings section.
